title: An Act authorizing the town of Marion to grant an additional license for the sale of all alcoholic beverages not to be drunk on the premises

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Sylvia of Fairhaven and Senator Dooner, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5378) of Mark D. Sylvia and Kelly A. Dooner (by vote of the town) that the town of Marion be authorized to grant an additional license for the sale of all alcoholic beverages not to be drunk on the premises in said town.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 05/15/2026 from 09:00 AM-05:00 PM in Written Testimony Only
Accompanied a new draft, see H5451
